question: What is the main topic of the conversation?
options: Discussing future goals after high school
answer_en: Discussing future goals after high school
answer_zh: 討論高中畢業後的未來目標
answer_ja: 高校卒業後の将来の目標について話している

question: Why do the friends feel sad at the beginning of the conversation?
options: They are moving to a new city
High school is over and they won't see each other every day
answer_en: High school is over and they won't see each other every day
answer_zh: 高中結束了，他們不會每天見面
answer_ja: 高校が終わり、毎日会えなくなるから

question: What do the friends promise to do despite going to different colleges?
answer_ja: 連絡を取り続ける

question: What event do they plan to meet at in the future?
answer_ja: 10年後の同窓会

question: What is Jeff's dream for 10 years from now?
options: To be a famous basketball player
answer_en: To be a famous basketball player
answer_zh: 成為著名的籃球運動員
answer_ja: 有名なバスケットボール選手になること

question: What does Natalie hope to have 10 years from now?
options: Four kids and a house full of children
answer_en: Four kids and a house full of children
answer_zh: 四個孩子和一個充滿孩子的家
answer_ja: 4人の子供と子供でいっぱいの家

question: What career does Emma want to pursue?
answer_ja: 医者

question: Where does Emma plan to live after finishing her schooling?
answer_ja: ニューヨーク

question: What is the future perfect tense used for?
options: Actions completed before a future point
answer_en: Actions completed before a future point
answer_zh: 在未來某個時間點之前完成的動作
answer_ja: 未来のある時点までに完了する動作

question: What is the formula for the future perfect tense?
answer_ja: will have + 過去分詞

question: How long until the friends leave for college?
answer_ja: 3週間

question: What activities do the friends plan to do before leaving for college?
options: Revisit favorite restaurants, hike trails, and watch movies
answer_en: Revisit favorite restaurants, hike trails, and watch movies
answer_zh: 重訪喜愛的餐廳、健行和看電影
answer_ja: お気に入りのレストランに行き、ハイキングし、映画を見る

question: What does Jeff say about forgetting his friends after becoming famous?
options: He will remember them because of beautiful memories
He will be too busy to think about them
answer_en: He will remember them because of beautiful memories
answer_zh: 因為美好的回憶，他會記得他們
answer_ja: 美しい思い出があるので彼らを覚えている

question: What does Natalie say about spending time with her husband before having kids?
options: They will have spent some time dating before having kids
answer_en: They will have spent some time dating before having kids
answer_zh: 他們會在有孩子前先約會一段時間
answer_ja: 子供ができる前にデートの時間を過ごす

question: What does Emma say about getting married and having kids?
options: She will definitely have kids in 10 years
She might get married and have kids in 15 years
She will marry before finishing medical school
answer_en: She might get married and have kids in 15 years
answer_zh: 她可能會在15年後結婚並有孩子
answer_ja: 15年後に結婚して子供を持つかもしれない

question: What does Jeff say about the effort needed to become a pro basketball player?
options: It requires luck and hard work
answer_en: It requires luck and hard work
answer_ja: 運と努力が必要

question: What does Emma hope to have by the time she finishes college?
options: Completed most of her schooling in New York
answer_en: Completed most of her schooling in New York
answer_zh: 在紐約完成大部分學業
answer_ja: ニューヨークでほとんどの学業を終える

question: What does Jeff joke about at the end of the conversation?
options: He will become rich and famous and forget them
answer_en: He will become rich and famous and forget them
answer_zh: 他會變得富有和有名然後忘記朋友
answer_ja: 裕福で有名になって彼らを忘れる

question: What phrase do they use to describe the unpredictability of life?
options: Life is beautiful and messy and never goes according to plan
answer_en: Life is beautiful and messy and never goes according to plan
answer_zh: 生活美麗又混亂，從不按計劃進行
answer_ja: 人生は美しく混沌としていて、計画通りにいかない

question: What do they say is important to have in life?
answer_ja: 目標と夢

question: What does 'keep in touch' mean?
answer_ja: 誰かと連絡を取り続ける

question: What does '10-year reunion' refer to?
options: A party after 10 years of friendship
A meeting of classmates 10 years after graduation
answer_en: A meeting of classmates 10 years after graduation
answer_ja: 卒業後10年の同窓会

question: What does 'mastered all of the skills' mean?
options: Learned and become very good at skills
answer_en: Learned and become very good at skills
answer_ja: スキルを習得し上手になる

question: What does 'joined an incredible team' mean?
options: Became a member of a great team
answer_en: Became a member of a great team
answer_ja: 素晴らしいチームの一員になる

question: What does 'spent most of my time' mean?
options: Used most of my time doing something
answer_en: Used most of my time doing something
answer_ja: ほとんどの時間を何かに使う

question: What does 'hiked all of our favorite trails' mean?
answer_zh: 走他們喜歡的健行路線
answer_ja: お気に入りのハイキングコースを歩く

question: What does 're-watched all of our favorite movies' mean?
options: Watched movies for the first time
answer_ja: お気に入りの映画をもう一度見る

question: What does 'worked with great coaches' imply?
answer_zh: 在優秀教練指導下訓練
answer_ja: 優れたコーチのもとでトレーニングする

question: What does 'turned into an amazing athlete' mean?
answer_ja: 素晴らしいアスリートになった

question: What does 'picture it' mean in the conversation?
answer_ja: 想像する

question: If you were to imagine your life 10 years from now, what would you like to be doing?
answer_ja: 以上すべて

question: How important do you think it is to keep in touch with friends after graduation?
answer_ja: とても重要

question: What are some ways you can keep in touch with friends who live far away?
answer_ja: 以上すべて

question: What are some challenges of moving to different colleges far away from friends?
answer_ja: 以上すべて

question: How can setting goals and dreams help you in life?
answer_ja: 以上すべて

question: What do you think about the idea of a 10-year reunion?
answer_ja: 再会する良い方法

question: How do you think life can be unpredictable?
answer_ja: 以上すべて

question: What skills do you think are important to master for your future career?
answer_ja: 以上すべて

question: What are some benefits of having dreams and goals?
answer_ja: 以上すべて

question: How would you describe your ideal life 10 years from now?
answer_ja: どれでもよい
